demoExplainer: A persistent sandbox you can freely add to, edit, and delete from. You can also export your modified demo — the download becomes a regular portfolio on re-import, leaving the built-in demo fixture untouched. The demo itself can't be renamed or deleted — it's a built-in fixture, not a user artifact.

delete.title: Delete "{{name}}"?
delete.body: This will permanently remove all accounts, transactions, and data for this portfolio. This cannot be undone.

fields.costMethodDescription: How cost basis is computed for securities.
fields.currencyDescription: All values are converted to this currency for portfolio-level totals.
fields.calendarDescription: Trading calendar identifier (e.g. NYSE, XETR). Leave blank for the global default.
fields.alphaVantageApiKeyDescription: Required to fetch quotes from Alpha Vantage.
fields.alphaVantageApiKeyConfigured: A key is configured. Enter a new value to replace it.
fields.alphaVantageRateLimitDescription: Calls per minute allowed by your Alpha Vantage plan.
